q3: The model understood formal register and logical flow fairly quickly, but it took several rounds to get the dependency logic at paragraph transitions right — it kept defaulting to sequential connectors rather than causal ones. The rhythm issue in 3.6 also required more back-and-forth than it should have; once I flagged that the plain-language moment had grown too long, the fix was immediate, but I shouldn't have needed to flag it in the first place.
